newsSince: No new material news since June 9. Q2 FY2026 (reported May 5, pre-window) beat with EPS $1.23 vs $1.06 est and showed data-center products at organic double-digit growth; FY guide $2.9-2.95B sales. Stock -1.6% since June 9.

sources.label: Investing.com: Atkore Q2 2026 beats, stock surges
Atkore sale of HDPE Pipe & Conduit business (BusinessWire)

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent power-and-grid lens: conduit/cable management for data centers showing double-digit organic growth is supportive, but Q2 (May 5) is pre-window and nothing new emerged since June 9. Prior verdict already moved it down for the displayed-vs-adjusted gap; hold.
verdicts.bull: Data-center conduit double-digit growth; portfolio simplification done; reasonable multiple.
verdicts.neutral: Solid but no new catalyst since June 9; cyclical construction exposure.
verdicts.bear: Commodity-conduit pricing, nonres construction cyclicality; only indirect AI tie.
